case_title: WORLDWIDE ASSET PURCHASING, LLC VS. LATASHA M COLLINS

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF HEARING RE: PETITION TO CONFIRM, CORRECT OR VACATE CONTRACTUAL ARB AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER WORLDWIDE ASSET PURCHASING, LLC HEARING SET FOR AUG-21-2007 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WORLDWIDE ASSET PURCHASING, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLLINS, LATASHA M $2,098.17 PRINCIPAL, $260.00 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,538.17, SEE SCANNED DOC
